generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"

namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance DTArtifactsGenerated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Deployable digital twin artifacts ready for deployment and integration"
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time status of building temperature conditions for operational monitoring"
]
instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Predictive insights for potential equipment failures and maintenance scheduling"
]

    rdfs:comment "Simulated outcomes of building performance under different scenarios"
]

    rdfs:comment "Analysis results highlighting inefficiencies and improvement opportunities"
]
instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Optimized operational settings for energy conservation and cost savings"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Immersive visual representation of building infrastructure status for Facility Managers"
]
instance CustomServiceIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Enabled integration of custom services for evolving digital twin capabilities"
]
instance DTArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Automatic generation of deployable digital twin artifacts from BIM models using MDE principles",
    DTDFVocab:provides DTArtifactsGenerated
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time monitoring of infrastructure assets via real-time insights",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Predictive analytics for forecasting building performance and maintenance needs",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Simulation of building performance under various operational scenarios",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]
instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Analysis of building data to identify trends and inefficiencies",
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Optimization of building operations for energy efficiency and cost reduction",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]
instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Interactive visualization for immersive monitoring and control of physical infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Integration of custom analytics services through standardized extension points in the modular architecture",
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationInsight
]
instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Model-Driven Engineering principles for extracting structured representations from enriched BIM models and generating deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention",
    DTDFVocab:enables DTArtifactGenerationService
]
instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Analytics services for processing sensor data and providing insights",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]
instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Modular architecture providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics",
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegrationService
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    rdfs:comment "Building Information Modeling (BIM) geometric representations used for digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    rdfs:comment "BIM geometric representations enriched with Building Control System (BCS) components defined by Building Control Engineers",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Temperature sensor in Building Control System (BCS) for monitoring thermal conditions",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance BuildingHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Humidity sensor in Building Control System (BCS) for monitoring air moisture levels",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingHumiditySensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time temperature readings from Building Control System sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticsEnabler
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time humidity readings from Building Control System sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticsEnabler
]
instance BuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    rdfs:comment "Physical building infrastructure asset within AECO domain",
    base:isContainedIn BuildingSystem
]
instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    rdfs:comment "Infrastructure assets within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain",
    base:contains BuildingComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are transmitted from the digital twin to physical building systems through bidirectional communication, enabling Facility Managers to interact with deployed DT for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange enables continuous synchronization between physical and digital components with no specified frequency or latency metrics beyond real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration via the DT Framework coordinating roles and components for bidirectional data exchange, enriched BIM model integration, and runtime configuration management to enable holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The framework supports the complete DT lifecycle from initial device modeling in BIM (Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers), through MDE-based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts, to runtime operations with real-time data exchange and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, and evolution via modular integration of custom services by DT Engineers."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the entanglement of the resulting Digital Twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, utilizing standardized protocols to facilitate bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is achieved through standardized BIM-based modeling and modular framework extension points, enabling integration with enterprise systems and external services though specific protocols are not detailed."
]
